title: 2019 Press Releases
summary: This is a Federal Reserve press release archive index page for calendar year 2019 containing approximately 100+ individual press release links spanning monetary policy (FOMC statements, minutes, projections), banking regulation, enforcement actions, and various administrative announcements. The page is a historical listing page, not a single archiveable document.
key_points: Source is a listing page (archive index), not a single coherent document
Contains economic projections from December 2019 FOMC meeting
Contains monetary policy implementation statement from 10/11/2019
Historical source from 2019 (approximately 6+ years old relative to TODAY)
Mixed content types: monetary policy, regulatory proposals, enforcement actions, banking applications, payment studies
why_it_matters: This listing page is not suitable for direct archival. Individual press releases should be extracted and archived separately. The index page provides the calendar of Fed communications for 2019 but itself contains no single actionable research note.

issues_found: PAGE_TYPE is listing_page; core rule 5 explicitly rejects listing pages
Source is an archive index containing ~100+ unrelated press releases, not a single coherent document
No single archiveable research note can be extracted from this listing page
Individual press releases (FOMC statements, minutes, projections) should be extracted and archived separately

notes: Non-archivable listing page. The page aggregates ~100+ individual 2019 Fed press releases across multiple categories: monetary policy (FOMC statements, minutes, projections, implementation), banking regulation, enforcement actions, and administrative matters. Individual items of interest for macro catalysts or market structure should be retrieved and archived separately. Source confidence reduced due to listing page type and historical age (2019).
